mission.title: spire: Implement the readiness endpoint for health checking
mission.description:
Signed-off-by: Ryuma Yoshida <ryuma.y1117@gmail.com>

**Pull Request check list**

- [x] Proper tests/regressions included?

Health check.

**Description of change**

I implemented the readiness endpoint for health checking.

**Which issue this PR fixes**

This PR fixes https://github.com/spiffe/spire/issues/1980.

resolution.summary:
Signed-off-by: Ryuma Yoshida <ryumyosh@zlab.co.jp>

**Pull Request check list**

- [x] Commit conforms to CONTRIBUTING.md?
- [ ] Proper tests/regressions included?
- [x] Documentation updated?

**Affected functionality**

Document

**Description of change**

I fixed the default value of metrics_addr in the k8s-workload-registrar doc according to the following code:
https://github.com/spiffe/spire/blob/v0.12.0/support/k8s/k8s-workload-registrar/config_reconcile.go#L26

I found the mistake while working on https://github.com/spiffe/spire/pull/2015#discussion_r556296087

**Which issue this PR fixes**

Nothing.
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
codeSnippets:
make images
SUITES='suites/k8s suites/k8s-reconcile' make integration
